summary: Sprawling stage/item decomp PR centered on grZakoGenerator. It implemented several previously stubbed grZakoGenerator functions, recovered shared zako generator data/config structs and item vars, updated many stage OnStart calls to pass NULL to the newly typed grZakoGenerator_801CAE04 pointer parameter, and added or improved several stage functions in grcorneria, grrcruise, groldkongo, grheal, grfigureget, granime, gronett, groldpupupu, and gricemt.

key_files.role: Main implementation: replaced several stubs and raw offset accesses with typed grZakoGenerator functions, allocation, spawn/update, cleanup, and item traversal logic.
evidence_refs: metadata.changed_files: added 321 deleted 42
raw_diff: grzakogenerator.c hunk implementing grZakoGenerator_801CA394, 801CA43C, 801CA67C, 801CA8B4, 801CAE04, 801CAF08
text_corpus: bot report lists multiple grzakogenerator new matches

key_files.path: many src/melee/gr/*.c and related item files
key_files.role: Broad callsite/prototype fallout: many stage OnStart functions changed grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(0/false) to grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(NULL), plus small item header/source updates.
evidence_refs: metadata.changed_files: 81 changed files
changed_files.jsonl lists all touched files
raw_diff repeated callsite changes from 0/false to NULL

what_changed: Implemented or improved several previously stubbed stage/zako functions, with bot-reported 14 new matches and 12 unmatched-item improvements.
Recovered grZakoGenerator shared structures in gr/types.h: SpawnDesc, Spawn, SpawnFunc, Config, Entry, and Data.
Updated grZakoGenerator APIs from void/int/UNK-style signatures to typed pointer and callback signatures, and propagated grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(NULL) across many stage OnStart callsites.
Replaced several raw offset or pad-array accesses with typed fields, including Corneria data indices/positions, grZakoGenerator_Data sentinel/entries, and Item itemVar.zako.idx.
Added or fixed includes needed for recovered signatures and field access in stage/item files.
Touched 81 files according to changed_files metadata, mostly under src/melee/gr plus a small set under src/melee/it.

smart_moves.text: Centralized recovered zako generator layouts in gr/types.h instead of leaving local raw structs or byte-offset accesses in grzakogenerator.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h adds grZakoGenerator_* typedefs
raw_diff: grzakogenerator.static.h imports gr/types.h and removes duplicate local struct definitions

smart_moves.text: Propagated the new pointer meaning of grZakoGenerator_801CAE04 by changing null callsites from 0/false to NULL across stages.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: repeated grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(0/false) to grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(NULL)
raw_diff: grzakogenerator.h declares HSD_GObj* grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc*)

smart_moves.text: Updated owning headers when function bodies clarified signatures, rather than keeping source-local unknown declarations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzakogenerator.h prototype updates
raw_diff: grcorneria.h prototype updates
raw_diff: grfigureget.h prototype update

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering a subsystem helper, expect broad callsite cleanup: a newly typed pointer parameter can require many 0/false callsites to become NULL for reviewable typed source.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZakoGenerator_801CAE04 signature changes to grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc*
raw_diff: repeated callsites changed to NULL

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered shared structs can unlock both the implementation and nearby users: grZakoGenerator_Data/Config/Entry typing coincides with cleanup in grzakogenerator.c, stage GroundVars, and item vars.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gr/types.h grZakoGenerator_* additions
raw_diff: grzakogenerator.c uses config->spawns, data->entries, sentinel, ip->xDD4_itemVar.zako.idx
text_corpus: bot report lists several grzakogenerator matches

decomp_lessons.lesson: Replacing pad arrays and casts with partial internal structs is useful even when names remain address/role-based; the Corneria data struct changed from a 0x4CC byte pad to indices and positions fields used directly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCn_Data pad split into indices and positions
raw_diff: grCorneria_801DDDA8 replaces casts into data->pad with data->indices and data->positions

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small helper inlines can express source intent and reduce generated-looking branches when tied to a local pattern, as shown by gricemt rand_zero wrapping the zero-or-HSD_Randi check.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline bool rand_zero(s32 n)
raw_diff: grIceMt_801F7080 replaces explicit HSD_Randi conditional with rand_zero

naming_conventions.convention: Use subsystem-prefixed recovered type names for shared stage/zako structures: grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc, grZakoGenerator_Spawn, grZakoGenerator_Config, grZakoGenerator_Entry, grZakoGenerator_Data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gr/types.h typedef additions

naming_conventions.convention: Use NULL for pointer arguments after a function signature is recovered as a pointer, rather than 0 or false.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZakoGenerator_801CAE04 callsites changed to NULL
raw_diff: grzakogenerator.h pointer signature

naming_conventions.convention: Short local role names such as gp, ip, jobj, gobj, pos are used where roles are clear.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzakogenerator.c uses Item* ip, Vec3 pos, HSD_GObj* gobj
raw_diff: grcorneria.c uses Ground* gp, HSD_JObj* jobj

naming_conventions.convention: Unknown global/function names remain address-style when semantics are not established, e.g. lbl_8049F030 and grZakoGenerator_801CA8B4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzakogenerator.static.h keeps lbl_8049F030
raw_diff: grzakogenerator.h keeps address-style function names

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK in narrow functions where matching evidence is present or nearby bot results show progress; examples include grZakoGenerator_801CA43C, grZakoGenerator_801CA67C, grZakoGenerator_801CAF08, grOnett_801E40E4, and grRCruise callback excerpt.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(4/8/16) occurrences
text_corpus: bot report lists matches/improvements for grZakoGenerator functions, grOnett_801E40E4, and grRCruise functions
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence does not include per-function objdiff logs beyond the bot summary, so PAD_STACK justification should remain tied to the reported match/improvement only.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Converted raw item variable offset access to a typed union arm field, ip->xDD4_itemVar.zako.idx, to stabilize item cleanup/spawn code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCharItems.h adds itZako_ItemVars
raw_diff: grzakogenerator.c replaces *(s32*)((u8*)ip + 0xDD8) with ip->xDD4_itemVar.zako.idx

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used natural loops for fixed-size initialization, duplicate checks, spawn descriptor transforms, and item traversal rather than keeping fully unrolled/generated-looking code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZakoGenerator_801CA67C initializes 80 entries and sentinel with for loops
raw_diff: grFigureGet_80219B10 loops over up to gp->gv.figureget.x8 entries
raw_diff: grZakoGenerator_801CAF08 traverses HSD_GObj_Entities->items with while

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Matched generated callback signatures by adding unused parameters where required by callsites or callback tables, e.g. Vec3*, s32 spawn callbacks and grFigureGet collision callback.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZakoGenerator_SpawnFunc typedef HSD_Generator* (*)(Vec3*, s32)
raw_diff: grCorneria_801E2454/801E2480 gain s32 arg1
raw_diff: grFigureGet_80219B10 signature includes Ground, CollData, mpLib_GroundEnum, f32

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2374 grZakoGenerator type recovery enabled broad stage callsite cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2374, grZakoGenerator_801CAE04 was recovered as HSD_GObj* grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc*), and many stage OnStart callsites were updated from 0/false to NULL. The same PR added grZakoGenerator_* shared structs in gr/types.h and produced bot-reported new matches in grzakogenerator.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzakogenerator.h signature update
raw_diff: repeated grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(NULL) callsites
text_corpus: bot report new grzakogenerator matches

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2374 shows partial struct recovery replacing pad/offset access in stage data
accepted_candidate_records.text: The Corneria data helper changed from a large pad-array representation to named indices and positions fields, and grCorneria_801DDDA8 then used data->indices and data->positions instead of casts into byte offsets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCn_Data struct field split
raw_diff: grCorneria_801DDDA8 field access rewrite
text_corpus: bot report grCorneria_801DDDA8 99.46% to 100%

source_update_candidates.title: gr/types.h owns shared grZakoGenerator layout types after PR 2374
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2374 added grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc, grZakoGenerator_Spawn, grZakoGenerator_SpawnFunc, grZakoGenerator_Config, grZakoGenerator_Entry, and grZakoGenerator_Data to src/melee/gr/types.h, with grzakogenerator.c and stage GroundVars using these types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h grZakoGenerator typedef additions
raw_diff: grzakogenerator.c uses the added types
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a source/path ownership fact candidate rather than a decomp lesson; curator should verify against current source before adding.

source_update_candidates.title: Pointer-signature recovery should propagate NULL callsites
source_update_candidates.text: When a recovered function signature proves an argument is a pointer, update null callsites to NULL rather than leaving 0 or false. PR 2374 does this for grZakoGenerator_801CAE04 after changing its parameter to grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc*.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzakogenerator.h pointer signature
raw_diff: many grZakoGenerator_801CAE04 callsites changed from 0/false to NULL
source_update_candidates.reason: This may already be covered by truthful headers/typed-source style, but the PR provides a concrete recurring example.

source_update_candidates.title: Keep PAD_STACK evidence tied to narrow match reports
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2374 contains several PAD_STACK uses alongside bot-reported function matches/improvements. The evidence supports recording PAD_STACK only as a narrow matching tactic with verifier context, not as normal style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK uses in grzakogenerator/gronett/grrcruise excerpts
text_corpus: bot report lists related matches/improvements
source_update_candidates.reason: This reinforces an existing standard; curator can decide whether the example should be indexed as supporting evidence rather than a new rule.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all 81 changed files contain meaningful decomp work; many show only one-line NULL callsite fallout in the loaded metadata/diff excerpt.
Do not treat the bot-reported merge as proof that every PAD_STACK or partial type name is ideal long-term style.
Do not promote the grCorneria_801E2738 regression as accepted; the bot report explicitly lists it as a broken match.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments are present.
